title: calamintha debilis
intro: Calamintha debilis, also known as slender calamintha or narrow-leaved basil, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family. Traditionally, Calamintha debilis has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and acting as a natural remedy for colds and fever. Calamintha debilis can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
